modules.comment: West-Coast generative patch — modulators are unwired by default; patch the Pulser/CurveLooper outputs into voice/filter parameters via the GUI to bring it alive
modules.name: transport

modules.comment: === CLOCK ===  master pulse divider — patch into voice triggers and CV S&H
modules.name: clock

modules.comment: PulseSequence as Euclidean / 8-step gate divider for triggering voices on uneven beats
modules.name: clock div

modules.comment: === CV: STEPPED VOLTAGE ===  ControlSequencer as quantized S&H — patch its output into wavetable position / filter cutoff
modules.name: stepped cv

modules.comment: === CV: SHAPED LFO ===  CurveLooper as drawn-curve LFO — patch into delay time, verb size, or wavetable morph
modules.name: shaped lfo

modules.comment: === LEAD VOICE ===  WavetableMorph for evolving timbre under CV control
modules.name: wave voice

modules.comment: Note source for the wave voice — sparse melodic gesture
modules.name: wave seq

modules.comment: === DRONE VOICE ===  TopologySynth as a sustained polyphonic drone bed
modules.name: drone voice

modules.comment: === VCF ===  TopologyFilter — sweep cutoff via stepped cv or shaped lfo for the classic west-coast ramp/fall
modules.name: vcf

modules.comment: === SPRING TANK ===  TopologyDelay as a long, modulated spring/tape echo
modules.name: spring

modules.comment: === SPACE ===  CohomologyVerb for the patch's outer atmosphere
modules.name: space
